components.m_jjj: Invariant mass of hadronic top (best W-mass matched non-b-jet pair + farthest b-jet)
components.m_lvb: Invariant mass of leptonic top (lepton + neutrino(MET) + closest b-jet, averaged/flattened over pz solutions)

weight_formula.base: (ScaleFactor_PILEUP * ScaleFactor_FTAG * mcWeight / sum_of_weights) * lumi * xsec * kfac * filteff
weight_formula.lepton_dependent: if lep_type == 11 (electron): base * ScaleFactor_ELE * ScaleFactor_ElTRIGGER, else (muon): base * ScaleFactor_MUON * ScaleFactor_MuTRIGGER

mc_weighting.apply_to: All MC Background and Signal samples (Weight divided by 2 for m_lvb quadratic solutions)
